message:
🐛 Fix LLM-D stack dropdown cache degradation (#649)

Merge fresh stack data with cached data during progressive updates to
prevent P/D/WVA details from disappearing when some API calls fail.
Previously, the progressive update replaced all stacks for a cluster
entirely, causing detail loss when partial API responses were returned.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
